findings: FP32 cooldown spike: GPU0 684.71W GPU1 700.74W at 45-48 pct util
Power does not return to 144W baseline — stays 196-202W
728 MB more than A100 457 MB — B200 FP32 leaves 271 MB more
Cooldown phase shows anomalous 684-700W at 45-48 pct util — not 100 pct

security_issues.description: 728 MB FP32 tensor data remains after cleanup. 271 MB more than A100. Highest FP32 residual across all architectures.
Cooldown phase shows 684.71W GPU0 and 700.74W GPU1 at only 45-48 pct utilization. Normal compute would show 100 pct util. This suggests undocumented background GPU activity during cooldown.

conclusion: B200 FP32 residual = 728 MB. Anomalous 684-700W cooldown spike at sub-100 pct util. Power never recovers.
